title: Sweet & Velvety British Nut Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and nut-free-friendly savory dish featuring pita bread in a sweet and velvety sauce thats perfect for a light meal or snack.

ingredients.name: Canned Pears (in their own juice, drained)
Peanut-Free Nut Butter (optional for texture, not required if pita is used well enough)
Olive Oil or Coconut Oil (for stir-frying)

instructions: Arrange the pita bread slices on a baking sheet and lightly brush each with olive oil. Bake for about 10 minutes until crisp and golden brown.
In a large saucepan, combine vegetable broth (or water), sugar, drained canned pears, and vanilla extract. Stir well to ensure all the pears are coated evenly.
Add peanut-free nut butter (if using) for added texture. Mix thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and let simmer for about 10 minutes until slightly thickened.
Gently stir in the crispy pita bread slices. Cook for another 5-7 minutes until heated through and the sauce is fully absorbed by the pita and pear mixture.
Serve warm or at room temperature with additional sliced pita on the side, if desired.
